center.name: 阿里卡
center.summary: 阿里卡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Markham's storm petrel，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | date=2015 | title=Markham's storm petrel breeding colonies discovered in Chile | journal=Neotropical Birding | volume=17 | pages=5–10 | url=http://www.neotropicalbirdclub.org/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/NB17-F1-Schmitt.pdf | access-date=2023-11-25 | archive-date=2023-11-18 | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231118183454/http://www.neotropicalbirdclub.org/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/NB17-F1-Schmitt.pdf | url-status=live }} populations of 34,684 nests in Arica, 20,000 nests in Salar Grande, and 624 nests in were found in the Atacama Desert of northern Chile, as reported in a 2019 study

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | date=2015 | title=Markham's storm petrel breeding colonies discovered in Chile | journal=Neotropical Birding | volume=17 | pages=5–10 | url=http://www.neotropicalbirdclub.org/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/NB17-F1-Schmitt.pdf | access-date=2023-11-25 | archive-date=2023-11-18 | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231118183454/http://www.neotropicalbirdclub.org/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/NB17-F1-Schmitt.pdf | url-status=live }} populations of 34,684 nests in Arica, 20,000 nests in Salar Grande, and 624 nests in were found in the Atacama Desert of northern Chile, as reported in a 2019 study
